content.en:
"This is it!"

Ye Tian came to a certain place in the Infinite Realm Ruins and began to look at the area in front of him.

According to the information of the Sunset Great Ancestor, this is the sea of broken ruins of the Infinite Boundary Ruins, and it is said that after a certain territory was broken, it was swallowed up by the Infinite Boundary Ruins, and then after a long period of evolution, this area was finally formed.

At this moment, Ye Tian could still see countless fragments suspended here, and there were also many immeasurable ruin monster lairs.

The fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion, Dongyun Great Ancestor, was trapped in this area, and only then did he inform the Remnant Heaven Pavilion by using special communication methods.

Ye Tian took out a communication item from the Remnant Heaven Pavilion and tried to contact the Winter Cloud Great Ancestor.

Soon, Ye Tian got in touch.

"Dongyun Great Ancestor, I am the Endless Great Ancestor, the Sunset Great Ancestor came to me to rescue you, where are your specific locations now?" Ye Tian asked.

"Endless Ancestor, I'm ......"

Dongyun Great Ancestor told the specific direction and explained some of his own situation.

It turned out that Dongyun Great Ancestor had broken into a magic circle here, and that magic circle might have been arranged by Heavenly Ancestor, even if it was very incomplete, it was not easy to come out.

This is actually not a big deal, but the key problem is that there are many immeasurable ruin monsters outside the magic circle, so even if Dongyun Great Ancestor comes out of the magic circle, he will be surrounded and killed by these immeasurable ruin monsters.

Therefore, Dongyun Great Ancestor did not dare to leave, so he could only seek rescue.

Swish!

Ye Tian flew quickly, and soon came to a certain location in the Sea of Broken Ruins.

Along the way, he also encountered many immeasurable ruin monsters to block him, but he directly killed them in seconds.

With his current strength, these fourth-stage immeasurable ruin monsters are simply ants!

"Circle, it should be here!"

Ye Tian took a look, and there were quite a few of these immeasurable ruin monsters outside the magic circle, about hundreds, and among them, there were more than thirty of them comparable to the immeasurable ruin monsters of the fourth stage.

The most powerful Infinite Ruins Monster can probably be compared to the fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform that has been tempered three times with its whole body.

It's just that what makes Ye Tian a little curious is, why do these immeasurable ruin monsters stay here all the time and don't leave?

This is not the lair of the immeasurable ruin monsters, it stands to reason that the Great Ancestor of Winter Cloud enters this magic circle, and after a long time, these immeasurable ruin monsters will definitely leave, and it is impossible to wait here all the time.

"Dongyun Great Ancestor and the Remnant Heaven Pavilion are afraid that they have concealed some information!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

It was normal for the Remnant Heaven Pavilion to conceal the situation, after all, he was not the Great Ancestor of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion, and the other party naturally wouldn't tell him the truth.

"Kill these immeasurable ruin monsters first!"

Ye Tian made a move and directly cast the amputated finger.

Boom Boom Boom !!

The immeasurable ruin monsters were killed by Ye Tian's severed fingers.

In the blink of an eye, the immeasurable ruin monsters here turned into corpses.

"Dongyun Great Ancestor, I have already killed the immeasurable ruin monsters in the outside world, do you have a way to come out?"

Ye Tian used the transmitter to communicate.

Soon, Dongyun Great Ancestor replied: "Endless Great Ancestor, please also attack this magic circle, if the magic circle is shaken, I have a way to take the opportunity to escape." "

"Good!"

Ye Tian directly shot out and bombarded this magic array.

Bang!!!

The magic circle began to be attacked and began to violently shake, but it was still not broken by Ye Tian.

"I didn't expect a broken magic circle to be able to block my attack!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised.

Although he didn't attack with all his strength, his attack also surpassed the full force of the top-level fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms!

At this moment, a figure rushed out from inside the circle.

"Thank you Endless Ancestor!"

After Dongyun Great Ancestor came out, he immediately thanked him.

Immediately, he sensed his surroundings and found the corpses of many immeasurable ruin monsters, some of which had an aura that was even more terrifying than his.

Suddenly, he was extremely in awe of Ye Tian.

"Dongyun Great Ancestor, it's time for us to go back!"

Ye Tian urged.

"Good!"

Dongyun Ancestor nodded.

Immediately, Ye Tian and Dongyun Great Ancestor returned to the Xuanqi Territory.

On the way back, there were no accidents, and I came back very calmly.

......

Headquarters of the Remnant Pavilion.

Ye Tian came back with the Great Ancestor of the Winter Clouds, and when the Great Ancestor of the Sunset saw this, he directly took out the Divine Blood Breath of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion.

"Endless Great Ancestor, this time it's thanks to you, otherwise our Winter Cloud Great Ancestor of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion will be in danger, this is the blood of the gods, please accept it!"

When the Sunset Ancestor handed over the Divine Blood Soil, his face was still a little reluctant, after all, this was a good thing, and the Remnant Heaven Pavilion had also paid a great price for this Divine Blood Soil.

But now, he had to hand it over.

"Okay, I'll take it!"

Ye Tian took the Divine Blood Breath and put it away.

He didn't stay here long, he just left.

And after Ye Tian left, the Sunset Ancestor and the Winter Cloud Ancestor entered a secret time and space in the headquarters of the Remnant Heaven Pavilion.

"Dongyun, have you got the thing?"

Sunset Ancestor asked.

"It's here!"

Dongyun Great Ancestor took out a crimson boulder.

"Sure enough, it's Red Spirit Gold, this is a priceless treasure, with this treasure, we can create armor and weapons that surpass the Golden God Armor Stone. Moreover, this is also one of the necessary materials to intervene in the Naked Wings, and the Taichen Palace is also collecting the Red Spirit Gold, so we can completely take out a little bit to trade with the Taichen Palace. Sunset Ancestor said excitedly.

"Yes, with such a piece of Red Spirit Gold, the Remnant Heaven Pavilion is expected to rise!Comparatively speaking, the loss of that piece of divine blood is not worth mentioning!"

"By the way, you were chased and killed by a large number of immeasurable ruin monsters when you captured the Red Spirit Gold before, and for this reason, you hid in the magic circle left by the Broken Bee Heavenly Ancestor, and that Endless Great Ancestor didn't enter that magic circle, right?"

Dongyun Ancestor shook his head, "Endless Ancestor didn't go in, and even if he wanted to, it would be difficult. We know the way to enter, so we can enter. The Endless Ancestor had no way to enter, so he could only forcibly break in. Even if he found some clues, there was nothing he could do, and I didn't believe he would be able to break the circle. "

"Yes, without the combat power of the fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeforms, it would be difficult to destroy that magic circle!" Sunset Great Ancestor agreed: "We found it there, but unfortunately we don't have the strength to take away the treasures left by that magic circle." If it weren't for saving you this time, there wouldn't be any need to expose it!"

"Sunset, it's already okay to be able to safely bring back this piece of red spirit gold. "

Dongyun Great Ancestor said with a smile.

"Hahaha, yes, with this piece of Chiling Gold, our Remnant Heaven Pavilion is indeed satisfied!"

The Sunset Great Ancestor laughed loudly, and was in a very good mood.

What they didn't know was that Ye Tian used the Escape Shuttle to escape directly into the Infinite Realm Ruins at this moment, and did not pass through the passage of Taichen Palace, so no one knew that he was going to the Sea of Broken Ruins again.
